ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded data */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the market on that date */,
  "turnover" INTEGER /* Total turnover for the market on that date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for that date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for stock splits and dividends */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in stock price compared to the previous day */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions recorded on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume for the stock on that date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Measure of the stock's price fluctuation over a period */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the stock exchange */,
  "is_index_component" INTEGER /* Whether the stock is part of a market index */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
